pages.text: The $(thing)Remote Terminal$() is the Tier 3 terminal - an $(thing)item$() (not a block) that opens a full Crafting Terminal interface from anywhere!

$(thing)Binding:$()$(br)1. Craft and hold a Remote Terminal.$(br)2. $(thing)Shift + right-click$() on your Storage Core.$(br)3. The terminal records that exact Core's persistent identity. Its tooltip shows the Core's position.$(br2)To rebind, shift-right-click the intended Core again.

$(thing)Using:$() Right-click while holding the bound Remote Terminal to open the Crafting Terminal menu from anywhere.$(br2)$(thing)Requirements:$()$(br)$(li)You must be in the $(thing)same dimension$() as the bound Core.$(li)The Core's $(thing)chunk must be loaded$() (use chunk loaders).$(li)The exact bound Core must still exist. Replacing it at the same coordinates requires rebinding.

The Remote Terminal provides the $(thing)full Crafting Terminal$() experience remotely. You can browse items, craft, toggle filters, and manage your storage - all without walking back to base.$(br2)A must-have for explorers and builders!
